---
title: "MOFA_Lipids_Class_enrichment"
output: html_document
date: "2025-11-17"
---


## Libraries
```{r}
library(openxlsx)
library(fgsea)
library(dplyr)
```


## Load files when working outside of DRE

```{r}
input_dir <- 'C:/Users/Z896216/Documents/MOFA_output/'

MOFA_Lipid_T_weights <- read.xlsx(file.path(input_dir, 'factorweights_Lipidomics__Targeted___imputed___log.xlsx'), rowNames=F)
#MOFA_Lipid_T_weights <- read.csv(file.path(input_dir, 'factorweights_Lipidomics__Targeted___imputed___log_Class.csv'), row.names=1)
```

Lipidomics features can be grouped in lipid classes. And the features within a class (species) have different chain lengths and number of double bonds.
```{r}
lipidomics_feature_metadata <- read.csv(file.path(input_dir, 'lipidomics_T_feature_metadata.csv'), row.names=1)
table(lipidomics_feature_metadata$Class)
```
Each Lipid Class has different nomenclature for structural properties
```{r}
lipidomics_feature_metadata[!duplicated(lipidomics_feature_metadata$Class), c("Feature", "Class")]
```

```{r}
lipid_sets <- split(lipidomics_feature_metadata$Feature, lipidomics_feature_metadata$Class)
lipid_sets[1:3]
```
Lipid Class ORA using fgsea
```{r}
MOFA_Lipid_T_weights_sorted <- MOFA_Lipid_T_weights[order(MOFA_Lipid_T_weights$Factor1, decreasing = T),]
ranked_lipids <- MOFA_Lipid_T_weights_sorted$Factor1
names(ranked_lipids) <- MOFA_Lipid_T_weights_sorted$Feature

gsea_results <- fgsea(
  pathways = lipid_sets,
  stats = ranked_lipids,
  minSize = 3,      # minimum lipids per class
  maxSize = 500,    # maximum lipids per class
  nproc = 1
)

gsea_results_strict <- gsea_results %>%
  filter(
    padj < 0.01,           # Stricter FDR
    abs(NES) > 1.8,        # Larger effect size
    sapply(leadingEdge, length) >= 5  # Meaningful leading edge
  ) %>%
  arrange(padj)
```

Factor 2
```{r}
MOFA_Lipid_T_weights_sorted <- MOFA_Lipid_T_weights[order(MOFA_Lipid_T_weights$Factor2, decreasing = T),]
ranked_lipids <- MOFA_Lipid_T_weights_sorted$Factor2
names(ranked_lipids) <- MOFA_Lipid_T_weights_sorted$Feature

gsea_results_F2 <- fgsea(
  pathways = lipid_sets,
  stats = ranked_lipids,
  minSize = 3,      # minimum lipids per class
  maxSize = 500,    # maximum lipids per class
  nproc = 1
)

gsea_results_F2_strict <- gsea_results_F2 %>%
  filter(
    padj < 0.01,           # Stricter FDR
    abs(NES) > 1.8,        # Larger effect size
    sapply(leadingEdge, length) >= 5  # Meaningful leading edge
  ) %>%
  arrange(padj)
```

Factor 3
```{r}
MOFA_Lipid_T_weights_sorted <- MOFA_Lipid_T_weights[order(MOFA_Lipid_T_weights$Factor3, decreasing = T),]
ranked_lipids <- MOFA_Lipid_T_weights_sorted$Factor3
names(ranked_lipids) <- MOFA_Lipid_T_weights_sorted$Feature

gsea_results_F3 <- fgsea(
  pathways = lipid_sets,
  stats = ranked_lipids,
  minSize = 3,      # minimum lipids per class
  maxSize = 500,    # maximum lipids per class
  nproc = 1
)

gsea_results_F3_strict <- gsea_results_F3 %>%
  filter(
    padj < 0.01,           # Stricter FDR
    abs(NES) > 1.8,        # Larger effect size
    sapply(leadingEdge, length) >= 5  # Meaningful leading edge
  ) %>%
  arrange(padj)
```

Factor 4
```{r}
MOFA_Lipid_T_weights_sorted <- MOFA_Lipid_T_weights[order(MOFA_Lipid_T_weights$Factor4, decreasing = T),]
ranked_lipids <- MOFA_Lipid_T_weights_sorted$Factor4
names(ranked_lipids) <- MOFA_Lipid_T_weights_sorted$Feature

gsea_results_F4 <- fgsea(
  pathways = lipid_sets,
  stats = ranked_lipids,
  minSize = 3,      # minimum lipids per class
  maxSize = 500,    # maximum lipids per class
  nproc = 1
)

gsea_results_F4_strict <- gsea_results_F4 %>%
  filter(
    padj < 0.01,           # Stricter FDR
    abs(NES) > 1.8,        # Larger effect size
    sapply(leadingEdge, length) >= 5  # Meaningful leading edge
  ) %>%
  arrange(padj)
```


Save to Excel
```{r}
library(openxlsx)

# create workbook
wb <- createWorkbook()

# add each sheet
addWorksheet(wb, "Factor1")
writeData(wb, "Factor1", gsea_results_strict)

addWorksheet(wb, "Factor2")
writeData(wb, "Factor2", gsea_results_F2_strict)

addWorksheet(wb, "Factor3")
writeData(wb, "Factor3", gsea_results_F3_strict)

addWorksheet(wb, "Factor4")
writeData(wb, "Factor4", gsea_results_F4_strict)

# save Excel file
saveWorkbook(wb, "MOFA_LipidClassEnrichments.xlsx", overwrite = TRUE)
```
